caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Increase
caribbean.paragraph: Turks & Caicos is experiencing 19 kt winds with 4.7 ft wave heights and a 62% rain probability, while Roatan has winds of 25 kt, making for a notable day in the Caribbean. I expect these conditions to impact marine activities, particularly for small crafts, as the winds and waves are significant enough to warrant caution, especially in the Western Caribbean near Roatan.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Naples is experiencing a 73% rain probability with winds reaching 17 kt and wave heights of 5.6 ft, while Dubrovnik has a less intense weather pattern with max winds of 11 kt. I expect the Central Mediterranean to see the most significant impacts today, particularly in Naples where the combination of wind and wave conditions will require careful navigation.
